categories.name: Nails
categories.intro: A considered menu of nail rituals—disciplined technique, calm pacing, and an editorial finish.

services.name: Classic Manicure
services.description: Meticulous nail shaping, cuticle refinement, and a clean, balanced polish finish.

services.name: Classic Pedicure
services.description: Structured foot care with exfoliation, shaping, and a smooth, polished result.

services.name: Russian Manicure
services.description: Advanced dry cuticle detailing for an ultra-precise, seamless nail contour.

services.name: Russian Pedicure
services.description: Precision cuticle and callus refinement delivering a clean, sculpted finish.

services.name: Gel Color Finish
services.description: Long-lasting gel application finished with a high-gloss, mirror-like surface.

services.name: Express Polish
services.description: A quick color refresh for a neat, understated appearance.

services.name: Softgel Structure
services.description: Lightweight softgel enhancement providing strength, flexibility, and natural elegance.

services.name: Refill Maintenance
services.description: Growth-area correction and structural balancing to maintain flawless alignment.

services.name: Gel Extension
services.description: Customized sculpted extensions designed for proportion, strength, and refined length.

services.name: Rubber Base Reinforcement
services.description: Flexible strengthening base layer enhancing durability and polish retention.

services.name: Signature Mani-Pedi Experience
services.description: A complete Arzé hand and foot ritual, concluded with a delicate cedar oil touch for a distinctive sensory signature.

services.name: Nail Art (Per Nail)
services.description: French, chrome, ombre, or cat-eye detailing executed with editorial precision; priced per nail.

categories.name: Massage
categories.intro: Body rituals designed to soften tension and restore balance—minimal, controlled, and deeply calming.

services.name: Relaxing Massage
services.description: A slow, intentional full-body massage performed the Arzé way—controlled pressure, fluid transitions, and a quiet sensory reset.

services.name: White Wood Therapy with Cedar Oil
services.description: Arzé’s sculpting ritual combining structured white wood therapy and warm Lebanese cedar oil to stimulate circulation and refine body contour.

services.name: Hot Stone Ritual
services.description: Heated stones glide in deliberate rhythm to dissolve deeper tension, finished with a subtle cedar oil veil for grounding warmth.

services.name: Thai Energy Flow
services.description: Assisted stretching and rhythmic pressure work to realign posture, improve flexibility, and awaken natural energy pathways.

categories.name: Brows & Lashes
categories.intro: Subtle, architectural refinement—clean lines, balanced shape, and effortless definition.

services.name: Brow Lamination
services.description: A controlled restructuring of the brow to create symmetry, lift, and a refined editorial finish.

services.name: Lash Lift
services.description: Precision lifting technique to enhance natural lashes with a soft, effortless curve.

services.name: Eye Refinement Package
services.description: A curated brow lamination and lash lift combination designed to frame the face with subtle harmony.

services.name: Precision Threading
services.description: Clean, defined brow shaping executed with controlled detailing for a polished appearance.
